products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Compatible with a wide range of Dolce Gusto machines

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s 2025 test of coffee capsules recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top picks, citing quality, taste and machine compatibility. The evidence is fresh, published on 2025‑03‑21.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
